base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of options — a ui (menu_screen) from 1990 dr mario. Options screen — speed (Low/Med/Hi) + level (0-20) + music (Fever/Chill/Off). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
